title: Stop Sniffing Around
description: This datapack removes the Sniffer from the game... COMPLETELY!
body:
# Hello, do you hate useless things? Me too! 
## So I made this datapack/mod that will remove the Sniffer from the game... COMPLETELY!
What else does this datapack do? Good question! It also:
1. Removes Sniffer Egg from suspicious sand Loot Table, making the Sniffer **UNOBTAINABLE** in survival.
2. Has a function that immediately takes care of any spawned Sniffers (~~no Sniffer is harmed during the process~~)
3. Removes all achievements that are related to the Sniffer and modifies those that only include it partialy _(such as Two by two)_ so that they can be completed.

## So... did I convince you that this datapack is what you're looking for?
If not, maybe this before and after will:

![Before installing Stop Sniffing Around](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/619db25cf35cff58544ade7acd959723c7eba7b8.jpeg)

![After installing Stop Sniffing Around](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90a0006ab2a2d0ff6cac263cbb7adc838fa9d231.jpeg)
